scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:cloudflare && npx wrangler@latest deploy --config deploy/cloudflare/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:api:cloudrun: gcloud run deploy mitm-api --source . --region us-central1 --allow-unauthenticated --env-vars-file deploy/cloud-run/cloudrun.env --set-secrets GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY:latest
scripts.test:e2e:launch: npx playwright test tests/e2e/funnel-compatibility.spec.ts --project="Desktop Chrome" --project="Desktop Safari" --project="Pixel 5" --project="iPhone 12"
